steps.title: Substitute x = 20 into the function
steps.content:
We need to find $f(20)$ where $f(x) = \frac{7}{10}x + 55$. Substitute $x = 20$:
$$f(20) = \frac{7}{10}(20) + 55$$

steps.title: Add the constant term
steps.content:
Now add 55 to the result:
$$14 + 55 = 69$$
The value of $f(20)$ is 69.
